task_name: D3 Strategy Status Audit Page Plan

page_purpose: Show all strategies and their current evidence/lifecycle status
Show D3 contract-readiness status separately from lifecycle and evidence status
Prevent users from interpreting D3 contract status as approval, promotion, or prediction endorsement
Provide a historical/read-only evidence index — not betting advice

strategy_registry_lifecycle_status.description: Current strategy registry / lifecycle status as stored in the replay strategy registry

p251_evidence_dashboard_payload.description: P251 evidence dashboard payload if available (GET /api/replay/evidence-dashboard)
p251_evidence_dashboard_payload.conditional: use if available; gracefully degrade if absent

p257_best_strategy_overview_payload.description: P257A best-N-bet strategy overview payload if available (GET /api/replay/best-strategy-overview)
p257_best_strategy_overview_payload.conditional: use if available; gracefully degrade if absent

p258_d3_contract_validation_artifact_cha.description: P258A–P258K D3 contract-validation arc artifact chain; provides d3_contract_status metadata

required_row_fields.description: Lottery type identifier (e.g., DAILY_539, BIG_LOTTO, POWER_LOTTO)
Current lifecycle status (e.g., ADOPTED, PROVISIONAL, REJECTED, RETIRED, HISTORICAL_ARTIFACT, EXPERIMENTAL)
Current evidence status (e.g., VALIDATED, PENDING, NULL, REJECTED_BY_OOS, OBSERVATION_ONLY)
Number of replay rows for this strategy in strategy_prediction_replays
Draw coverage description (e.g., '1500 draws', 'short window only')
Best-N-bet strategy status from P257A overview if available
Path or identifier of the most recent evidence artifact for this strategy
D3 contract-readiness status — one of the allowed values only
Human-readable reason for the d3_contract_status value
Mandatory warning: 'D3 contract status is NOT approval. NOT_YET_REJECTED is not approval.' Must always be present regardless of d3_contract_status.
Mandatory disclaimer: 'D3 is not a prediction model. Contract validation does not imply improved prediction accuracy.'
Mandatory disclaimer: 'This information is historical/read-only evidence only. It is not betting advice.'

allowed_d3_contract_statuses.meaning: Strategy has not been submitted to D3 contract validation. This is the default state for all strategies.
All D3 input contract boundaries are present and well-formed. NOT_YET_REJECTED — does not imply approval, improved accuracy, or production readiness.
One or more D3 input contract boundaries failed validation (ContractValidationError raised). Strategy cannot proceed to gate evaluation without fixing contract issues.
Strategy is a historical artifact (REJECTED, RETIRED, or HISTORICAL_ARTIFACT lifecycle). D3 contract evaluation is not applicable.
Strategy has no replay rows in strategy_prediction_replays. D3 contract evaluation requires replay data.

required_safety_copy.d3_not_prediction_model: D3 is not a prediction model.
required_safety_copy.contract_validation_not_strategy_evaluat: Contract validation is not strategy evaluation.
required_safety_copy.no_accuracy_implication: Passing contract validation does not imply improved prediction accuracy.
required_safety_copy.no_betting_advice: This page is historical/read-only evidence only, not betting advice.

future_task_split.p258m_authorized_scope: P258M may implement read-only artifact-backed API contract only, if explicitly authorized. Must not write DB, must not modify recommendation/production/registry/deployment paths.
future_task_split.p258n_authorized_scope: P258N may implement UI display only, if explicitly authorized after P258M API contract is merged.
future_task_split.running_d3_on_real_candidates: FORBIDDEN — requires separate future task and explicit authorization beyond P258N
